title: fagraea carstensensis
intro: Fagraea carstensensis, also known as the Carstens' fagraea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Fagraea carstensensis include relief from congestion, bronchitis, and other respiratory conditions, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate headaches. In traditional herbal preparations, Fagraea carstensensis is often used in tea infusions or as a component in herbal remedies, often in combination with other plants, to enhance its medicinal effects.
